description: Phase 1 UI capture coverage policy. Every route from go_router.dart must be captured, aliased to a canonical capture surface, planned, or explicitly excluded.

routes.reason: Transient startup state; capture only when launch UX work needs it.
Static welcome/start fixture.
Baseline phone-entry auth capture; OTP state can be added as a variant.
Baseline onboarding welcome capture; deeper steps can be added as variants.
Current-user calendar fixture with booked and saved events.
Same event detail surface reached from the calendar entry path.
Saved events list fixture with deterministic club lookup.
Same event detail surface reached from saved events.
Profile-backed filter defaults fixture.
Same event detail surface reached from the dashboard.
Event location map fixture using the deterministic placeholder map fallback.
Main review surface with current user, upcoming event, notifications, and recommendations.
Activity notifications fixture with upcoming event context.
Event discovery and club browse review surface.
Distinct Explore map-mode route; needs a deterministic map fixture before marking it captured.
Member-state club detail fixture with upcoming events and reviews.
Canonical event detail captured across standard, ticket, and spotlight presentations; reused by calendar, saved, and dashboard aliases.
Deterministic attendee companion fixture using the default live guide plan.
Main Catches hub with an active post-event catch window.
Post-event roster and catch-window candidate.
Attended event recap fixture with remembered attendee tiles.
Match list fixture with active conversations and new matches from synthetic personas.
Marketing match chat context candidate backed by the synthetic sales persona catalog.
First working raw light/dark review capture.
Review history fixture with event context.
Public profile review surface backed by the synthetic sales persona fixture.
Account and safety settings fixture with current user data.
Payment history baseline empty state.
Route requires transaction extra; capture only with deterministic confirmation data.
New host operations home for the split host app; needs a dedicated host-shell capture fixture.
New host clubs management surface; needs a dedicated host-shell capture fixture.
Host-mode club detail includes professional host controls and should not be aliased to the consumer member detail capture.
Host app create-club route owns the create-club form surface.
Host app edit-club route owns the edit-club form surface.
Host app create-event route owns the host event setup flow.
Host app event detail can render host-state actions and needs a dedicated host fixture.
Host app manage route captured with live console and post-event report variants.
Host app edit-event route owns the hosted event edit surface.
Host app attendance route opens the canonical live attendance section of host event management.
Host app Event Success route enters the canonical host event management surface.
Professional host inbox is separate from consumer dating chats and needs a dedicated host-message capture fixture.
Professional host conversation view should be captured separately from dating chat.
Host account/settings surface is distinct from consumer account settings and needs a host profile fixture.
Host profile editing is a new host settings sub-route and needs a dedicated host profile fixture.
Dev-gated lab route.
Dev-gated lab route.
Manual QA surface, not baseline app review.
Dev-gated preview route.
